title: Front-End Developer
description: venU is looking for a Front-End Developer to join our team. We are building innovative solutions and need someone with strong web development skills who can contribute to our growing platform. The role involves working with modern web technologies and collaborating with a dynamic team.
description_short: Front-End Developer at venU - Building innovative solutions with modern web technologies. Remote position.

application_data.cover_letter:
Dear VenU Team,

I'm writing to express my interest in the front-end developer position. While I may not yet have experience with SVN and LMS, I do have experience with databases and CMS. I also bring a strong general web development foundation, self-starter mentality, and a quick adaptability from being self-taught.

Managing a Sonic Drive-In at a young age sharpened my skills to have clear communication, composure under pressure, and the ability to keep multiple priorities moving without losing attention to detail. All of which has made me the developer I am today!

Since 2023, I've been building polished, responsive websites using Vue, Nuxt, and Tailwind CSS, balancing aesthetics with practicality across every project. I like making slick designs while focusing on accessibility and progressive web enhancements so that every user gets a great experience.

I enjoy fast-paced, collaborative environments where interruptions are welcomed and the feedback loop is quick, but can also thrive when left alone. Thank you for your time and consideration for this opportunity. I hope to talk more soon!

Best Regards,
Tristan Carter

title: Junior Market Specialist Analyst
company: team members from anywhere in the world
description: Shumba Capital Ltd is an international company focused on digital assets, market research, and data-driven trading. We work with crypto markets and help our team grow from the ground up. We are fully remote and welcome team members from anywhere in the world. We are looking for a Junior Market Specialist / Analyst with at least 1 year of experience in crypto or trading. You will support daily market operations, monitor trading activity, and help improve our strategies. This is a hands-on role where you will learn and contribute at the same time. Key Responsibilities Monitor crypto market movements, prices, and liquidity. Support trading operations on exchanges (Spot, Futures, Options). Help with rebalancing assets across multiple exchanges (CEX and DEX). Track and report technical or financial issues to the development team. Work with internal data and charts to find market signals. Ensure trading bots follow risk rules and performance targets. Assist with treasury records and coordinate with the finance team. Communicate with the commercial team about client trading results. What We Offer Fully remote work — no location restrictions. Flexible hours (suitable for different time zones). Work with real market data and professional tools. Opportunity to grow within an international team. Supportive environment with feedback and collaboration. Requirements Basic understanding of spot, futures, and options markets. Analytical mindset and attention to detail. Ability to work under pressure and make quick decisions. Good communication skills in English (written and spoken). Team player, adaptable, and self-organized.
description_short: Shumba Capital Ltd is an international company focused on digital assets, market research, and data-driven trading. We work with crypto markets and help our team grow from the ground up. We are fully remote and welcome team members from anywhere in the world. We are looking for a Junior Market Specialist / Analyst with at least 1 year of experience in crypto or trading. You will support daily market operation
